basic_details.job_title: IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology, Ropar (IIT Ropar)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology, Ropar (IIT Ropar) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc or equivalent degree in Physics with 60% marks (or CGPA 6.5/10) and valid GATE/CSIR-UGC NET/LS/JEST qualified.
qualification.details: M.Sc or equivalent degree in Physics with 60% marks (or CGPA 6.5/10) and valid GATE/CSIR-UGC NET/LS/JEST qualified.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date for sending your application documents via email is 23rd July 2026. It is advisable to submit your application well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc or equivalent degree in Physics with at least 60% marks or a CGPA of 6.5/10. A valid GATE/CSIR-UGC NET/LS/JEST qualification is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000 plus HRA.

faq.question: Q4. How will the selection be made for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve a walk-in interview. Candidates are expected to attend the interview with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for the IIT Ropar Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The application process is to be done via email. Candidates need to send their resume and relevant documents to the designated official email address.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Indian Institute of Technology, Ropar, Rupnagar, Punjab, 140001.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position. The duration of the contract will be as per the terms and conditions mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from other states apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from any state are eligible to apply, provided they meet the specified educational qualifications and other eligibility criteria.
